originalTitle: INSANE (Official Music Video) - Black Gryph0n & Baasik
content: In celebration of the 5-year anniversary of our Platinum Record "INSANE"! https://open.spotify.com/track/5flerg6aEao2VayZezVlgu?si=dEFvFn77TI6hGC50kBbHyg&dl_branch=1 Words can not describe how blown away I am by this music video. I'm honored and humbled to have such talented people bringing our song to life!! PLEASE give them all a follow and hire them for your projects (while you still can)!! CREDITS----------- "Insane" Written By: Gabe & Nate brown (Black Gryph0n & Baasik) Vocal Performance By: Gabe Brown (Black Gryph0n) Music Video Directed By: Gabe & Luximus Board Lead/Storyboarded/Rough Animation By: Luximus - https://bsky.app/profile/luximus17.bsky.social https://www.youtube.com/@Luximus17 Clean Up Lead & Production Supervisor: Tort Cunningham “torteraex” - https://x.com/dumbbirdappbad https://www.youtube.com/@torteraex Clean Up: Ponta Azarmginhaghighi Jen Bradley - https://x.com/glawkbot https://www.youtube.com/@glawkbot Emily Chen - https://www.instagram.com/hyor.rlly?utm_source=qr Larimar L. Peguero - https://www.tiktok.com/@cursed_slime?_r=1&_t=ZS-97IKlIqVn6I https://x.com/Simphony_Da_Kat Erik Quezada Perez - https://x.com/Teri_Stories Evie Shih - https://www.instagram.com/evie.s.art/ Mercedes Anaya Zarzosa Additional FX: Jen Bradley Emily Chen Larimar L. Peguero Background Team: Leslie Erkocevic - https://bsky.app/profile/lunwere.bsky.social https://www.instagram.com/lunwere/ Jazmine Gubbe - https://www.instagram.com/jazmine.gubbe/ Bianca Dar Juan - https://bsky.app/profile/5wordsman.bsky.social https://youtube.com/@5wordsman?si=mfotoqavV0DstrXM Arina Samson Design Team: Luximus Leslie Erkocevic Compositing: Luximus torteraex Sound Design/Editor: Baasik Luximus ‘Alastor’ and ‘Hazbin Hotel’ belong to Vivienne Medrano This fan animation is non-canon and is not officially affiliated with Spindlehorse Productions. LYRICS----------- Dearly beloved, For your entertainment, it's my pleasure to introduce to you Hell’s latest arrival; The equal-opportunity killer, Alastor! Hello, it’s nice to meet you! Can you tell me where I am? I don’t know how I got here But I think I’m starting to understand. I don’t belong among the angels And baby, that’s just fine with me. The things I did up there were high school But now I’m going for my degree Hey Sorry, but you just got in my way I promise, honey, I can feel your pain And maybe I enjoy just a little bit Does that make me insane? Haven’t been the same since I expired Doesn’t mean that I plan to retire And now I have the power to bathe all of you in entertaining fire! CHORUS - Wait a minute, do I know you? Weren’t you an old pal of mine? Departed from us far too early But now we’re meeting a second time. We used to have such fun together And maybe you have what I need But first, I have one tiny question Tell me, do you demons bleed? CHORUS - Hey Sorry, but you just got in my way I promise, honey, I can feel your pain And maybe I enjoy just a little bit Does that make me insane? Haven’t been the same since I expired Doesn’t mean that I plan to retire And now I have the power to bathe all of you in entertaining fire! Hey Sorry, but you just got in my way I promise, honey, I can feel your pain And maybe I enjoy just a little bit Does that make me insane? END----------- HELLO DDR's (Dedicated Description Readers) What a crazy journey this has been... It's moments like this that put life into perspective! When we wrote this song 5 years ago, Nate had just gotten out of the Navy, I had just started shifting gears from Impressions to original music, and we were all trying to figure out how to make a living doing what we love: making music and videos. Since then, my brother and I have written multiple charting records, been featured in Fortnite, NCIS, Poppy Playtime, Billie Bust Up, Garten of Ban Ban, and America's Got Talent (twice)! I became a pilot and bought my own airplane, Claire became a producer for Rob Riggle's podcast "Riggle's Picks", and Nate (is very private, but his life has also changed in so many ways). This song helped define the business that we run today and we couldn't be more grateful! So, to everyone who made this possible, THANK YOU!!!

chineseContent: 庆祝我们的白金唱片《INSANE》发行五周年！ https://open.spotify.com/track/5fl​​erg6aEao2VayZezVlgu?si=dEFvFn77TI6hGC50kBbHyg&dl_branch=1 言语无法形容这段音乐视频给我带来的震撼。我很荣幸也很荣幸有如此才华横溢的人将我们的歌曲变为现实！请关注他们并雇用他们来完成您的项目（趁您还可以）！制作人员 ---------- 《Insane》 编剧：Gabe & Nate Brown (Black Gryph0n & Baasik) 声乐表演：Gabe Brown (Black Gryph0n) 音乐视频 导演：Gabe & Luximus 董事会负责人/故事板/粗略动画 作者：Luximus - https://bsky.app/profile/luximus17.bsky.social https://www.youtube.com/@Luximus17 Clean Up Lead及制作主管：Tort Cunningham “torteraex” - https://x.com/dumbbirdappbad https://www.youtube.com/@torteraex 清理：Ponta Azarmginhaghighi Jen Bradley - https://x.com/glawkbot https://www.youtube.com/@glawkbot Emily Chen - https://www.instagram.com/hyor.rlly?utm_source=qr Larimar L. Peguero 背景团队：Leslie Erkocevic - https://bsky.app/profile/lunwere.bsky.social https://www.instagram.com/lunwere/ Jazmine Gubbe - https://www.instagram.com/jazmine.gubbe/ Bianca Dar Juan - https://bsky.app/profile/5wordsman.bsky.social https://youtube.com/@5wordsman?si=mfotoqavV0DstrXM Arina Samson 设计团队：Luximus Leslie Erkocevic 合成：Luximus torteraex 声音设计/编辑：Baasik Luximus ‘Alastor’ 和 ‘Hazbin Hotel’ 属于 Vivienne Medrano 此同人动画非经典，并非
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
